required_preferences.fact: Schedules adequate lunch and snack breaks with ergonomic postures and screen-free downtime, as skipping meals plus poor ergonomics worsens shoulder and neck pain

supersedes.fact: Only eats lunch if it’s scheduled as a calendar event; never grabs snacks during client calls

required_preferences.fact: Follows a strict doctor-prescribed IBS dietary regimen—tracks food triggers daily and avoids spontaneous meal changes; never prepares weekly meal plans without reviewing symptom logs from prior days

supersedes.fact: Preps weekly meal plans each Sunday, but skips prep if work is hectic—never relies on frozen meals

required_preferences.fact: Prepares in-depth workshop materials and rehearses presentations repeatedly before all public speaking engagements to reduce pre-event anxiety
Checks Slack and instant messages hourly for retainer client on dedicated workdays, but silences notifications from other clients during those periods
Spends 30 minutes weekly updating her LinkedIn profile and posting industry news—never ignores her professional online presence
Blocks out time daily for rapid learning and skill acquisition in the unfamiliar CRM platform—prioritizes urgent client needs over her own certification progress and typical admin routines

persona: A freelance consultant specializing in CRM solutions for small businesses
